texto: I am inundated with feeling. I feel like a pinball machine on tilt. All the buzzers are ringing, lights are flashing, and I am about to fry my circuits. Nothing is coming in,and nothing is going out. I feel electrified. The wires ignited, sparked, and fizzled. I want it all to slow down. I go right to the water to douse my flame. I immerse myself in the hot water. I want to wash the smells off my body. I can smell Isabella's hair, her breath, and her child vaginal scent. My hair smells of smoke,and I want to wash Francis off me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Holly A. Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “I am inundated with feeling. I feel like a pinball machine on tilt. All the buzzers are ringing, …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, buzzers, child-sexual-abuse pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de child-sexual-abuse e electricity.

frase_original: I am inundated with feeling. I feel like a pinball machine on tilt. All the buzzers are ringing, lights are flashing, and I am about to fry my circuits. Nothing is coming in,and nothing is going out. I feel electrified. The wires ignited, sparked, and fizzled. I want it all to slow down. I go right to the water to douse my flame. I immerse myself in the hot water. I want to wash the smells off my body. I can smell Isabella's hair, her breath, and her child vaginal scent. My hair smells of smoke,and I want to wash Francis off me.

texto: Shamed and enraged, I sit by the side of the road and cry.Eclipsed by a sense of disgrace, my emotions feel momentarily stifled and disconnected. Instead of anger, I feel dishonored and exposed. I cannot even formulate my thoughts, much less speak them. My integrity and humility have been violated. I have only my own indignation to spur me on.
explicacao: Citação de Holly A. Smith sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Shamed and enraged, I sit by the side of the road and cry.Eclipsed by a sense of disgrace, my emo…” articula tempo, abuse, disconnected em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como viagem e disconnected.

texto: It is at the times when I feel that I have nothing that the gem lies in the palm of my hand.
explicacao: Citação de Holly A. Smith sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “It is at the times when I feel that I have nothing that the gem lies in the palm of my hand.” articula tempo, empty, hand em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como hand e key.
